assertionResults.title: should not show retry for client errors

assertionResults.title: should call onRetry when retry button pressed

assertionResults.fullName: ErrorBoundary Retry Logic should track retry count
assertionResults.title: should track retry count

assertionResults.title: should show loading state during retry

assertionResults.title: should show degraded mode option

assertionResults.title: should enter degraded mode on continue

assertionResults.title: should re-render children when degraded fallback provided
